prompt: I want 'Descale the water filter jug' to come back 10 days after I complete it each time — not on a fixed schedule.
paraphrases: Set up 'Descale the water filter jug' to repeat 10 days after each completion (not on fixed dates).

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='RQafterCompSource00001' AND rt1_repeatingTemplate IS NOT NULL AND rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL AND trashed=0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Descale the water filter jug' AND start=2 AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>tp</key><integer>1</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fu</key><integer>16</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fa</key><integer>10</integer>%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Descale the water filter jug'
